reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Gamut application homepage with agent list visible.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260707-233304-m0hk" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent detail page with message input interface ready.

Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed processing in approximately 12 seconds and returned to idle state.
Verified response contains "Example Domain" — Response clearly shows "The page title is "Example Domain"" and "The page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". Browser closed."
